seoTitle: Lelon Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors Product Catalog | LiTong Electronics
seoDescription: Browse Lelon aluminum electrolytic capacitors, radial lead, snap-in, SMD, and solid polymer capacitors. Technical specifications, selection guide, and alternative parts.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Lelon capacitor for my application?
faqs.answer: Consider voltage rating, capacitance value, ripple current requirements, temperature range, and lifetime requirements. Lelon offers comprehensive selection guides for each product series. For consumer applications, RGA series provides excellent value. For high-temperature, select RGH series. For SMD applications, consider VZH series.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team with your application specifications for personalized Lelon capacitor selection assistance.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Lelon's RGA and RGH series?
faqs.answer: RGA series is Lelon's general-purpose line offering excellent performance at competitive pricing for standard applications. RGH series provides higher temperature ratings (125°C) for demanding applications. Both series feature Taiwan manufacturing quality but target different application requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use RGA series for general-purpose applications. Use RGH series for high-temperature or demanding environments.

faqs.question: What are Lelon's automotive-grade capacitors?
faqs.answer: Lelon's automotive-grade capacitors are AEC-Q200 qualified and designed specifically for vehicle applications. These capacitors undergo rigorous testing including temperature cycling, vibration, and mechanical shock. They feature extended temperature ratings up to 125°C and enhanced reliability for automotive electronics.
faqs.decisionGuide: For automotive applications requiring AEC-Q200 qualification, select Lelon's automotive series capacitors.

faqs.question: Are Lelon capacitors suitable for LED lighting applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, Lelon capacitors are widely used in LED drivers and lighting applications. The company's capacitors offer high reliability and long lifetime at competitive prices, making them ideal for LED lighting where cost-performance is important. RGA and RGH series are particularly popular for these applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for recommendations on Lelon capacitors for LED lighting applications.

faqs.question: What is the quality difference between Taiwan-made and China-made Lelon capacitors?
faqs.answer: Lelon maintains consistent quality standards across all manufacturing locations. Premium series are manufactured in Taiwan using advanced production equipment. For standard applications, China-made capacitors provide excellent value. For mission-critical applications, specify Taiwan-made capacitors.
faqs.decisionGuide: For maximum reliability, specify Taiwan-made Lelon capacitors, particularly for demanding applications.

categories.name: Radial Lead Capacitors
categories.description: High-reliability radial aluminum electrolytic capacitors for general-purpose applications
categories.longDescription: Lelon radial lead capacitors offer excellent quality and value for a wide range of applications. The RGA series provides reliable performance for general-purpose use, while the RGH series offers higher temperature ratings for demanding environments. These capacitors feature Lelon's advanced manufacturing technology and quality control processes, ensuring consistent performance. Available in a wide range of capacitance and voltage ratings, Lelon radial capacitors are the preferred choice for cost-sensitive applications requiring reliable performance. Contact LiTong Electronics, your authorized Lelon distributor, for radial capacitor selection guidance.
categories.selectionGuide: Select based on capacitance, voltage rating, size constraints, and lifetime requirements. RGA series for general purpose, RGH for high temperature.

faqs.question: What are the typical applications for Lelon Radial Lead Capacitors?
faqs.answer: Lelon Radial Lead Capacitors are widely used in power supplies, LED lighting, industrial controls, consumer electronics, and automotive applications. They provide reliable energy storage, filtering, and decoupling functions. The specific application depends on the capacitance value, voltage rating, and package type selected. Lelon's reputation for quality and competitive pricing makes these capacitors ideal for cost-sensitive applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product catalog to find the right Lelon Radial Lead Capacitors for your application, or contact our FAE team for selection assistance.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Lelon Radial Lead Capacitors for my design?
faqs.answer: When selecting Lelon Radial Lead Capacitors, consider these key parameters: voltage rating (with 20-50% derating), capacitance value, ripple current requirements, temperature range, lifetime requirements, and physical size constraints. Also evaluate ESR characteristics for high-frequency applications and consider the mounting style for your PCB design. Lelon provides comprehensive datasheets to aid selection.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our online selection guide or contact our FAE team with your specifications for personalized recommendations.

faqs.question: What is the typical lifetime of Lelon Radial Lead Capacitors?
faqs.answer: The lifetime of Lelon Radial Lead Capacitors varies by series and operating conditions. Standard series typically offer 2,000 to 5,000 hours at rated temperature, while high-temperature series can provide 10,000 hours or more. Actual lifetime depends heavily on operating temperature and voltage derating - following the Arrhenius relationship where every 10°C reduction doubles the lifetime. Lelon capacitors are known for exceeding rated lifetimes in actual applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: For specific lifetime calculations based on your operating conditions, contact our FAE team.

faqs.question: Are Lelon Radial Lead Capacitors RoHS compliant and environmentally friendly?
faqs.answer: Yes, all Lelon Radial Lead Capacitors are RoHS compliant and free from lead, mercury, cadmium, and other restricted substances. They meet international environmental standards and are suitable for worldwide distribution. Lelon also complies with REACH regulations and maintains ISO 14001 environmental management certification.
faqs.decisionGuide: For specific environmental compliance documentation, contact our sales team with your part numbers.

faqs.question: What makes Lelon Radial Lead Capacitors competitive in the market?
faqs.answer: Lelon Radial Lead Capacitors benefit from decades of Taiwanese manufacturing expertise, modern production facilities, and efficient quality control processes. These factors result in capacitors with competitive pricing, good reliability, and consistent performance. Lelon's cost-performance ratio makes them an attractive alternative to more expensive Japanese brands for many applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request samples to evaluate Lelon quality in your application and compare with other brands.

faqs.question: What is the lead time for Lelon Radial Lead Capacitors?
faqs.answer: Standard Lelon Radial Lead Capacitors typically have 4-6 weeks lead time from Taiwan, shorter than many Japanese manufacturers. Popular series may be available from local stock at LiTong Electronics for immediate delivery. For large volume orders or custom specifications, lead time may be 8-10 weeks. Contact our sales team for current stock availability and scheduled delivery options.
faqs.decisionGuide: For urgent requirements, check our local stock or discuss scheduled orders with our sales team.

products.name: Radial Capacitor 1000uF 25V
products.shortDescription: Radial Capacitor 1000uF 25V RGA-1000uF-25V - High-quality aluminum electrolytic capacitor
descriptionParagraphs: The RGA-1000uF-25V is a high-quality aluminum electrolytic capacitor from Lelon, a leading Taiwanese capacitor manufacturer. With 1000uF capacitance and 25V rating, it provides reliable performance for demanding applications.

This capacitor features Lelon's advanced manufacturing technology and quality control processes, ensuring consistent performance and long operational life. The robust construction withstands harsh operating conditions.
Rated for 105°C operation with 1.2A ripple current capability, this capacitor is suitable for industrial, consumer, and commercial applications requiring reliable performance.

faeReview.author: Michael Chen
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Power Electronics
faeReview.content: In my extensive experience with Lelon capacitors, the RGA-1000uF-25V consistently delivers excellent performance at competitive pricing. The 1000uF/25V rating is well-suited for a wide range of applications. Lelon's Taiwan manufacturing quality ensures reliable operation even in demanding conditions. I particularly appreciate the cost-performance ratio of this series, making it ideal for cost-sensitive applications without compromising reliability.
faeReview.highlight: Excellent cost-performance choice for radial lead capacitors applications

alternativeParts.useCase: Use for applications where lower capacitance is acceptable. Compare voltage and ripple current ratings before selection.

alternativeParts.reason: Higher voltage rating for increased safety margin
alternativeParts.useCase: Use for applications requiring higher voltage margin. Compare voltage and ripple current ratings before selection.

applicationScenarios.description: Output filtering for LED driver using RGA-1000uF-25V
Filtering for industrial electronic control unit

faqs.question: What is the maximum ripple current for the RGA-1000uF-25V?
faqs.answer: The rated ripple current is 1.2A at 105°C and 120Hz. This rating ensures reliable operation in power supply applications with moderate switching frequencies. At lower temperatures, the capacitor can handle higher ripple currents - approximately 1.4A at 85°C. For high-frequency applications above 100kHz, the effective ripple current capability may be reduced due to increased ESR. Always verify the actual operating temperature and frequency conditions in your application to ensure the capacitor operates within its safe operating area.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications exceeding 1.2A ripple current, consider using multiple capacitors in parallel or upgrading to a higher capacitance model. Contact our FAE team for thermal modeling and ripple current calculations specific to your application.

faqs.question: What is the expected lifetime of the RGA-1000uF-25V at typical operating conditions?
faqs.answer: The rated lifetime is 2,000 hours at 105°C. Using the Arrhenius equation, we can calculate the expected lifetime at different operating temperatures. At 85°C, the expected lifetime extends to 8,000 hours. At 65°C, lifetime increases to 32,000 hours. At 25°C ambient, you can achieve up to 128,000 hours. Every 10°C reduction in operating temperature approximately doubles the capacitor lifetime. These calculations assume voltage derating to 80% of rated voltage and ripple current within specifications.
faqs.decisionGuide: For maximum capacitor lifetime, operate at the lowest practical temperature with 80% voltage derating. Contact our FAE team for lifetime calculations specific to your application conditions.

faqs.question: What voltage derating is recommended for reliable operation of the RGA-1000uF-25V?
faqs.answer: Industry best practice recommends operating aluminum electrolytic capacitors at no more than 80% of their rated voltage. For this 25V rated capacitor, the maximum recommended operating voltage is 20V. This 20% derating significantly improves reliability and extends operational lifetime. For critical applications or high-temperature environments, 50% derating is recommended, limiting operating voltage to 12V. The voltage derating also provides margin for voltage transients and line regulation variations. Operating above 80% of rated voltage will significantly reduce capacitor lifetime.
faqs.decisionGuide: Design your circuit to operate the capacitor at 80% or less of rated voltage for optimal reliability. Contact our FAE team for voltage derating recommendations specific to your application requirements.

faqs.question: What is the operating temperature range of the RGA-1000uF-25V and how does it affect performance?
faqs.answer: This capacitor is rated for operation from -40°C to +105°C. At the maximum rated temperature of 105°C, the capacitor achieves its rated lifetime of 2,000 hours. As operating temperature decreases, capacitor lifetime increases exponentially following the Arrhenius relationship - approximately doubling for every 10°C reduction. Capacitance and ESR also vary with temperature, with capacitance typically increasing 10-15% at low temperatures and decreasing slightly at high temperatures. ESR generally decreases as temperature increases, improving high-frequency performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: For extended capacitor lifetime, minimize operating temperature through proper thermal design and ventilation. Contact our FAE team for thermal management recommendations specific to your application.

faqs.question: What is the ESR of the RGA-1000uF-25V and how does it affect circuit performance?
faqs.answer: The Equivalent Series Resistance (ESR) at 100Hz is approximately 0.020 Ohm. ESR represents the resistive losses in the capacitor and directly affects ripple voltage, power dissipation, and filtering effectiveness. Lower ESR results in lower ripple voltage for a given ripple current, reduced self-heating, and improved filtering at high frequencies. This capacitor's ESR characteristics make it suitable for switching power supplies and industrial controls. ESR typically decreases with increasing temperature and increases at higher frequencies.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring lower ESR, consider our low-impedance series or connect multiple capacitors in parallel. Contact our FAE team for ESR optimization recommendations.

faqs.question: What applications is the RGA-1000uF-25V best suited for?
faqs.answer: The RGA-1000uF-25V with 1000uF capacitance and 25V rating is well-suited for a variety of applications including switching power supplies, industrial controls, LED drivers, and consumer electronics. Its compact size and reliable performance make it ideal for applications where space is limited but performance cannot be compromised. The capacitor's temperature rating and ripple current capability support reliable operation in demanding environments.
faqs.decisionGuide: For specific application recommendations, contact our FAE team with your circuit requirements and operating conditions.

Capacitance and ESR also vary with temperature, with capacitance typically increasing 10-15% at low temperatures and decreasing slightly at high temperatures. ESR generally decreases as temperature increases, improving high-frequency performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: For extended capacitor lifetime, minimize operating temperature through proper thermal design and ventilation. Contact our FAE team for thermal management recommendations specific to your application.

faqs.question: What is the ESR of the LGU-4700uF-100V and how does it affect circuit performance?
faqs.answer: The Equivalent Series Resistance (ESR) at 100Hz is approximately 0.005 Ohm. ESR represents the resistive losses in the capacitor and directly affects ripple voltage, power dissipation, and filtering effectiveness. Lower ESR results in lower ripple voltage for a given ripple current, reduced self-heating, and improved filtering at high frequencies. This capacitor's ESR characteristics make it suitable for switching power supplies and industrial controls. ESR typically decreases with increasing temperature and increases at higher frequencies.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring lower ESR, consider our low-impedance series or connect multiple capacitors in parallel. Contact our FAE team for ESR optimization recommendations.

faqs.question: What applications is the LGU-4700uF-100V best suited for?
faqs.answer: The LGU-4700uF-100V with 4700uF capacitance and 100V rating is well-suited for a variety of applications including switching power supplies, industrial controls, LED drivers, and consumer electronics. Its compact size and reliable performance make it ideal for applications where space is limited but performance cannot be compromised. The capacitor's temperature rating and ripple current capability support reliable operation in demanding environments.
faqs.decisionGuide: For specific application recommendations, contact our FAE team with your circuit requirements and operating conditions.

categories.name: SMD Capacitors
categories.description: Surface mount aluminum electrolytic capacitors for compact designs
categories.longDescription: Lelon SMD capacitors provide reliable performance in compact surface mount packages for modern electronic designs. The VZH series offers excellent characteristics for automated assembly and high-density applications. These capacitors are ideal for consumer electronics, telecommunications, and portable devices where space is at a premium. Lelon's SMD capacitors combine competitive pricing with reliable performance for cost-sensitive applications. Contact LiTong Electronics for SMD capacitor selection guidance.
categories.selectionGuide: Select based on capacitance, voltage rating, case size, and temperature requirements. VZH series for general SMD applications.

faqs.question: What are the typical applications for Lelon SMD Capacitors?
faqs.answer: Lelon SMD Capacitors are widely used in power supplies, LED lighting, industrial controls, consumer electronics, and automotive applications. They provide reliable energy storage, filtering, and decoupling functions. The specific application depends on the capacitance value, voltage rating, and package type selected. Lelon's reputation for quality and competitive pricing makes these capacitors ideal for cost-sensitive applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product catalog to find the right Lelon SMD Capacitors for your application, or contact our FAE team for selection assistance.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Lelon SMD Capacitors for my design?
faqs.answer: When selecting Lelon SMD Capacitors, consider these key parameters: voltage rating (with 20-50% derating), capacitance value, ripple current requirements, temperature range, lifetime requirements, and physical size constraints. Also evaluate ESR characteristics for high-frequency applications and consider the mounting style for your PCB design. Lelon provides comprehensive datasheets to aid selection.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our online selection guide or contact our FAE team with your specifications for personalized recommendations.

faqs.question: What is the typical lifetime of Lelon SMD Capacitors?
faqs.answer: The lifetime of Lelon SMD Capacitors varies by series and operating conditions. Standard series typically offer 2,000 to 5,000 hours at rated temperature, while high-temperature series can provide 10,000 hours or more. Actual lifetime depends heavily on operating temperature and voltage derating - following the Arrhenius relationship where every 10°C reduction doubles the lifetime. Lelon capacitors are known for exceeding rated lifetimes in actual applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: For specific lifetime calculations based on your operating conditions, contact our FAE team.

faqs.question: Are Lelon SMD Capacitors RoHS compliant and environmentally friendly?
faqs.answer: Yes, all Lelon SMD Capacitors are RoHS compliant and free from lead, mercury, cadmium, and other restricted substances. They meet international environmental standards and are suitable for worldwide distribution. Lelon also complies with REACH regulations and maintains ISO 14001 environmental management certification.
faqs.decisionGuide: For specific environmental compliance documentation, contact our sales team with your part numbers.

faqs.question: What makes Lelon SMD Capacitors competitive in the market?
faqs.answer: Lelon SMD Capacitors benefit from decades of Taiwanese manufacturing expertise, modern production facilities, and efficient quality control processes. These factors result in capacitors with competitive pricing, good reliability, and consistent performance. Lelon's cost-performance ratio makes them an attractive alternative to more expensive Japanese brands for many applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request samples to evaluate Lelon quality in your application and compare with other brands.

faqs.question: What is the lead time for Lelon SMD Capacitors?
faqs.answer: Standard Lelon SMD Capacitors typically have 4-6 weeks lead time from Taiwan, shorter than many Japanese manufacturers. Popular series may be available from local stock at LiTong Electronics for immediate delivery. For large volume orders or custom specifications, lead time may be 8-10 weeks. Contact our sales team for current stock availability and scheduled delivery options.
faqs.decisionGuide: For urgent requirements, check our local stock or discuss scheduled orders with our sales team.

This capacitor features Lelon's advanced manufacturing technology and quality control processes, ensuring consistent performance and long operational life. The robust construction withstands harsh operating conditions.
Rated for 105°C operation with 0.5A ripple current capability, this capacitor is suitable for industrial, consumer, and commercial applications requiring reliable performance.

alternativeParts.useCase: Use for applications where lower capacitance is acceptable. Compare voltage and ripple current ratings before selection.

alternativeParts.useCase: Use for applications requiring higher voltage margin. Compare voltage and ripple current ratings before selection.

applicationScenarios.description: Output filtering for LED driver using VZH-100uF-35V
Filtering for industrial electronic control unit

faqs.question: What is the maximum ripple current for the VZH-100uF-35V?
faqs.answer: The rated ripple current is 0.5A at 105°C and 120Hz. This rating ensures reliable operation in power supply applications with moderate switching frequencies. At lower temperatures, the capacitor can handle higher ripple currents - approximately 0.6A at 85°C. For high-frequency applications above 100kHz, the effective ripple current capability may be reduced due to increased ESR. Always verify the actual operating temperature and frequency conditions in your application to ensure the capacitor operates within its safe operating area.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications exceeding 0.5A ripple current, consider using multiple capacitors in parallel or upgrading to a higher capacitance model. Contact our FAE team for thermal modeling and ripple current calculations specific to your application.

faqs.question: What is the expected lifetime of the VZH-100uF-35V at typical operating conditions?
faqs.answer: The rated lifetime is 2,000 hours at 105°C. Using the Arrhenius equation, we can calculate the expected lifetime at different operating temperatures. At 85°C, the expected lifetime extends to 8,000 hours. At 65°C, lifetime increases to 32,000 hours. At 25°C ambient, you can achieve up to 128,000 hours. Every 10°C reduction in operating temperature approximately doubles the capacitor lifetime. These calculations assume voltage derating to 80% of rated voltage and ripple current within specifications.
faqs.decisionGuide: For maximum capacitor lifetime, operate at the lowest practical temperature with 80% voltage derating. Contact our FAE team for lifetime calculations specific to your application conditions.

faqs.question: What voltage derating is recommended for reliable operation of the VZH-100uF-35V?
faqs.answer: Industry best practice recommends operating aluminum electrolytic capacitors at no more than 80% of their rated voltage. For this 35V rated capacitor, the maximum recommended operating voltage is 28V. This 20% derating significantly improves reliability and extends operational lifetime. For critical applications or high-temperature environments, 50% derating is recommended, limiting operating voltage to 17V. The voltage derating also provides margin for voltage transients and line regulation variations. Operating above 80% of rated voltage will significantly reduce capacitor lifetime.
faqs.decisionGuide: Design your circuit to operate the capacitor at 80% or less of rated voltage for optimal reliability. Contact our FAE team for voltage derating recommendations specific to your application requirements.

faqs.question: What is the operating temperature range of the VZH-100uF-35V and how does it affect performance?
faqs.answer: This capacitor is rated for operation from -40°C to +105°C. At the maximum rated temperature of 105°C, the capacitor achieves its rated lifetime of 2,000 hours. As operating temperature decreases, capacitor lifetime increases exponentially following the Arrhenius relationship - approximately doubling for every 10°C reduction. Capacitance and ESR also vary with temperature, with capacitance typically increasing 10-15% at low temperatures and decreasing slightly at high temperatures. ESR generally decreases as temperature increases, improving high-frequency performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: For extended capacitor lifetime, minimize operating temperature through proper thermal design and ventilation. Contact our FAE team for thermal management recommendations specific to your application.

faqs.question: What is the ESR of the VZH-100uF-35V and how does it affect circuit performance?
faqs.answer: The Equivalent Series Resistance (ESR) at 100Hz is approximately 0.053 Ohm. ESR represents the resistive losses in the capacitor and directly affects ripple voltage, power dissipation, and filtering effectiveness. Lower ESR results in lower ripple voltage for a given ripple current, reduced self-heating, and improved filtering at high frequencies. This capacitor's ESR characteristics make it suitable for switching power supplies and industrial controls. ESR typically decreases with increasing temperature and increases at higher frequencies.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring lower ESR, consider our low-impedance series or connect multiple capacitors in parallel. Contact our FAE team for ESR optimization recommendations.

faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring lower ESR, consider our low-impedance series or connect multiple capacitors in parallel. Contact our FAE team for ESR optimization recommendations.

faqs.question: What applications is the OPL-150uF-25V best suited for?
faqs.answer: The OPL-150uF-25V with 150uF capacitance and 25V rating is well-suited for a variety of applications including switching power supplies, industrial controls, LED drivers, and consumer electronics. Its compact size and reliable performance make it ideal for applications where space is limited but performance cannot be compromised. The capacitor's temperature rating and ripple current capability support reliable operation in demanding environments.
faqs.decisionGuide: For specific application recommendations, contact our FAE team with your circuit requirements and operating conditions.
